cases.prompt_body: Closer lower-right Challenger ignition crop, right booster aft field-joint seam, orange external tank lower body edge, orbiter aft belly edge, launch platform hardware, and flame trench relation remain canonical and recognizable, the shuttle is still planted on the pad, bright early ignition light blooms from below, one thin pale smoke curl leaks from the lower right booster aft field-joint seam and stays attached and smaller than the booster body, no ascent, cool dawn haze, restrained documentary tension

Orthographic lower-right Shuttle Challenger stack detail at initial ignition, orange tank lower taper, right white booster aft field joint, orbiter aft underside edge, and fixed platform relation remain canonical, one narrow light-gray smoke thread marks the lower right booster joint and bends slightly into the air while staying source-localized, early ignition glow below the stack, no liftoff, no detached puff, no platform-wide smoke, restrained blue-gray dawn light

Tighter seam-and-platform Challenger ignition shot, the lower right booster aft joint is the dominant readable clue while the orange tank lower section, orbiter aft belly, and pad hardware confirm Challenger identity, initial engine ignition glows below the stack, one thin localized smoke emergence from the lower right booster joint only, no tower arm visible, no ascent, no broad cloud, restrained cool documentary light

jobs.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, ui overlay, crowded scene, many small objects, unreadable background detail, motion blur, action pose, blockbuster cinematic lighting, poster design, collage fragments, multiple surreal events, competing bright accents, off-pad ascent, shuttle already airborne, climbing rocket, whole-stack hero shot, full shuttle portrait, full tower portrait, tower arm in frame, detached gantry, broad platform cloud, thick dark spill-out plume, site-wide smoke sheet, detached smoke graphics, explosion, fireball, debris, breakup, painterly abstraction, generic rocket, malformed shuttle, missing orbiter wings, missing orange tank, single-stick rocket body
